hypothesis: If a diffusion model trained exclusively on metastable state data is guided during inference by interpolated conditional scores (SBI) and refined via energy-maximizing force projection along the score-difference reaction coordinate (SAA), then it will generate chemically valid transition state structures without requiring any transition state training data, because the interpolated score fields implicitly encode the reaction pathway connecting the metastable states and the ascent procedure locates the saddle point geometry along that pathway.
